plugins.name: dotlight-skillset
plugins.description: A lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers — Aspire (4 skills incl. aspire-mcp-first for runtime debugging), OpenTelemetry, ILSpy, Blazor Playwright, 3 specialized .NET agents, and rider-mcp-first (50-90% token savings when Rider MCP is attached). 0.4.2 sharpens rider-mcp-first invocation framing.
